text: Peripheral blood samples (0.5 mL) underwent erythrocyte lysis using 5 mL ACK lysis buffer (Gibco, USA) through 10-minute incubation at room temperature. Following centrifugation at 1000 ×g for 5 min, the cellular pellet was washed twice with phosphate-buffered saline (PBS) and subsequently resuspended in 1 mL PBS.
